name: OrderedDict

unions.name: OrderedDict
unions.comment: A type of `Dict` that is iterated by the order of insertion.

values.name: diff
values.comment: Keep a key-value pair when its key does not appear in the second dictionary.
values.type: OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v

values.name: empty
values.comment: Create an empty dictionary.
values.type: OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v

values.name: filter
values.comment: Return a new `OrderedDict` that only contains entries that satisfy a predicate.
values.type: (comparable -> v -> Basics.Bool) -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v

values.name: foldl
values.comment: Fold the key-value pairs in a dictionary, in insertion order.
values.type: (comparable -> v -> b -> b) -> b -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> b

values.name: foldr
values.comment: Fold the key-value pairs in a dictionary, in reverse insertion order.
values.type: (comparable -> v -> b -> b) -> b -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> b

values.name: fromList
values.comment: Convert an association list into a dictionary.
values.type: List.List ( comparable, v ) -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v

values.name: get
values.comment: Get the value associated with a key. Return `Nothing` if the key is not found.
values.type: comparable -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> Maybe.Maybe v

values.name: insert
values.comment:
Insert a key-value pair into a dictionary. Replace the value if the key
already exists.
values.type: comparable -> v -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v

values.name: intersect
values.comment:
Keep a key-value pair when its key appears in the second dictionary.
Preference is given to values in the first dictionary.
values.type: OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment: Check if a dictionary is empty.
values.type: OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> Basics.Bool

values.name: keys
values.comment: Get all of the keys in a dictionary, in insertion order.
values.type: OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> List.List comparable

values.name: map
values.comment: Apply a function to all values in a dictionary.
values.type: (comparable -> a -> b) -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable a -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable b

values.name: member
values.comment: Check if a key is in a dictionary.
values.type: comparable -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> Basics.Bool

values.name: partition
values.comment:
Split a `OrderedDict` to a tuple of `OrderedDict`. The first contains all
entries that satisfy the predicate, and the second contains the rest.
values.type: (comparable -> v -> Basics.Bool) -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> ( OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v, OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v )

values.name: remove
values.comment:
Remove a key-value pair from a dictionary. If the key doesn't exist,
no changes are made.
values.type: comparable -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v

values.name: singleton
values.comment: Create a dictionary with one key-value pair.
values.type: comparable -> v -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v

values.name: size
values.comment: Get the number of key-value pairs in the dictionary.
values.type: OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> Basics.Int

values.name: toList
values.comment: Convert a dictionary into an association list of key-value pairs, in insertion order.
values.type: OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> List.List ( comparable, v )

values.name: union
values.comment:
Combine two dictionaries. If there is a collision, preference is given
to the first dictionary.

    union (singleton "x" 1) (singleton "x" 2) == singleton "x" 1
values.type: OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v

values.name: update
values.comment:
Update the value of a specific key with an updater function.

Since the key may not exist before or after the update, the updater function
takes a `Maybe v` and returns a `Maybe v`.
values.type: comparable -> (Maybe.Maybe v -> Maybe.Maybe v) -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v

values.name: values
values.comment: Get all of the values in a dictionary, in insertion order.
values.type: OrderedDict.OrderedDict comparable v -> List.List v

name: OrderedSet

unions.name: OrderedSet
unions.comment: A type of `Set` that is iterated by the order of insertion.

values.name: diff
values.comment: Keep values of the first set that do not appear in the second set.
values.type: OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable

values.name: empty
values.comment: Create an empty set.
values.type: OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable

values.name: filter
values.comment: Return a new `OrderedSet` that only contains values that satisfy a predicate.
values.type: (comparable -> Basics.Bool) -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable

values.name: foldl
values.comment: Fold the values in a set, in insertion order.
values.type: (comparable -> b -> b) -> b -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> b

values.name: foldr
values.comment: Fold the values in a set, in reverse insertion order.
values.type: (comparable -> b -> b) -> b -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> b

values.name: fromList
values.comment: Convert a list into a set, removing any duplicates.
values.type: List.List comparable -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable

values.name: insert
values.comment: Insert a value into a set.
values.type: comparable -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable

values.name: intersect
values.comment: Combine two sets. Keep values that appear in both sets.
values.type: OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment: Check if a set is empty.
values.type: OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> Basics.Bool

values.name: map
values.comment: Apply a function to all values in a set.
values.type: (comparable -> comparable2) -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable2

values.name: member
values.comment: Check if a value is in a set.
values.type: comparable -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> Basics.Bool

values.name: partition
values.comment:
Split a `OrderedSet` to a tuple of `OrderedSet`. The first contains all
values that satisfy the predicate, and the second contains the rest.
values.type: (comparable -> Basics.Bool) -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> ( OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable, OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable )

values.name: remove
values.comment:
Remove a value from a set. If the value doesn't exist,
no changes are made.
values.type: comparable -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable

values.name: singleton
values.comment: Create a set with one value.
values.type: comparable -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable

values.name: size
values.comment: Get the number of values in the set.
values.type: OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> Basics.Int

values.name: toList
values.comment: Convert a set into a list, sorted by insertion order.
values.type: OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> List.List comparable

values.name: union
values.comment: Combine two sets. Keep all values while removing any duplicates.
values.type: OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable -> OrderedSet.OrderedSet comparable
